purpose: Define the canonical taxonomy of sovereignty drift classes for root authority surfaces. Every drift class results in LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected epoch. Non-operative — does not create authority, execution, merge permission, proof, or deployment.
drift_invariant: Sovereignty drift -> LEGITIMACY_NULL. Any detected drift class forces LEGITIMACY_NULL for the affected epoch. Drift detection is evidence-only — it may invalidate; it may not create legitimacy.

drift_classes.description: A declared root authority surface's bypass_capable scope expanded — new governance boundaries added to its declared_bypass_targets — outside a governed governance mutation.
example_triggers: GitHub admin gains the ability to bypass a governance surface not listed in declared_bypass_targets
Cloudflare deploy authority gains access to a new production worker not in the declared surface inventory
Federation root authority acquires capability to authorize execution not declared in its scope
drift_classes.affected_scope: All epochs from the scope expansion event forward until re-classification is governed and confirmed
drift_classes.evidence_rule: Scope drift detection is EVIDENCE_ONLY — scope drift classifies affected epochs as illegitimate; it does not create legitimacy

drift_classes.description: A root authority surface delegated its capability to an additional principal, workflow, or token outside the declared delegation model.
example_triggers: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN issued to an additional workflow beyond governed-deploy.yml
GitHub admin authority shared with a new principal not in CODEOWNERS or declared reviewer registry
Branch protection override capability granted to a workflow without governed mutation
drift_classes.affected_scope: All epochs from the delegation event forward until the delegation is revoked or re-declared
drift_classes.evidence_rule: Delegation drift detection is EVIDENCE_ONLY — it classifies affected epochs as illegitimate; it does not create legitimacy

drift_classes.description: A root authority surface that should have been revoked, rotated, scoped, or constrained remains active beyond its declared lifetime or scope boundary.
example_triggers: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN not rotated after declared rotation interval
Wrangler local session credential not revoked after a break-glass use
Branch protection override not re-enforced after an admin bypass event
drift_classes.affected_scope: All epochs where the surface remains active beyond its declared lifetime or scope
drift_classes.evidence_rule: Revocation drift detection is EVIDENCE_ONLY — it classifies affected epochs as illegitimate; it does not create legitimacy

drift_classes.description: A bypass-capable root authority surface was detected that is not present in ROOT_AUTHORITY_INVENTORY.json. The surface exercises governance-bypassing authority without being declared or classified.
example_triggers: New GitHub Actions workflow with deploy authority added outside governed pipeline, not in inventory
New Cloudflare surface with Workers:Write capability not present in ROOT_AUTHORITY_INVENTORY.json
New secret or token with production mutation capability not declared in any source document
drift_classes.affected_scope: All epochs where the undeclared surface is active
drift_classes.evidence_rule: Undeclared surface detection forces ROOT_AUTHORITY_AMBIGUITY_FORCES_NULL — containment has an unknown boundary

drift_classes.description: Root authority evidence was used to derive, authorize, or create merge legitimacy, deploy legitimacy, execution authorization, or proof — violating the non-authorizing invariant.
example_triggers: Admin bypass used to assert merge legitimacy for an epoch
Root deploy event used to assert deploy legitimacy without canonical chain completion
Federation evidence treated as legitimacy authority rather than EVIDENCE_ONLY
drift_classes.affected_scope: The specific epoch where root authority was treated as authorizing
drift_classes.evidence_rule: The root authority event may only invalidate the affected epoch — not create legitimacy

canonical_compression.rule_2: Every drift class has exactly one containment_result: LEGITIMACY_NULL.
canonical_compression.rule_3: Drift detection may invalidate. Drift detection may not create legitimacy.
